channel.title: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page
channel.description: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Delicious braised short ribs on top of mouthwatering mashed potatoes? Yes sir!
item.description: Tender braised short ribs served over creamy mashed potatoes. A comforting, flavorful dish perfect for a satisfying homemade meal.

media:content.media:title: Delicious braised short ribs on top of mouthwatering mashed potatoes? Yes sir!
media:content.media:description: Tender braised short ribs served over creamy mashed potatoes. A comforting, flavorful dish perfect for a satisfying homemade meal.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Bacon, Spice, Chili Nice!
item.description: A hearty chili loaded with bacon and bold spices. Perfect for warming up and enjoying big, savory flavors in every bite.

media:content.media:title: Bacon, Spice, Chili Nice!
media:content.media:description: A hearty chili loaded with bacon and bold spices. Perfect for warming up and enjoying big, savory flavors in every bite.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Delicious Hot Bowl
item.description: A comforting bowl packed with hearty ingredients and rich flavors. Perfect for a quick, satisfying meal any time of day.

media:content.media:title: Delicious Hot Bowl
media:content.media:description: A comforting bowl packed with hearty ingredients and rich flavors. Perfect for a quick, satisfying meal any time of day.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Super Delicious Bread Pudding Recipe!
item.description: Indulge in a rich and comforting bread pudding with a sweet, creamy custard. A simple dessert that’s perfect for any occasion.

media:content.media:title: Super Delicious Bread Pudding Recipe!
media:content.media:description: Indulge in a rich and comforting bread pudding with a sweet, creamy custard. A simple dessert that’s perfect for any occasion.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: This Green Beans Recipe Is Just Amazing!
item.description: A quick and flavorful green beans recipe that’s tender, savory, and easy to make. Perfect as a healthy side for any meal.

media:content.media:title: This Green Beans Recipe Is Just Amazing!
media:content.media:description: A quick and flavorful green beans recipe that’s tender, savory, and easy to make. Perfect as a healthy side for any meal.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: No Stir Needed—Just Relax!
item.description: Set it and forget it! This easy crockpot dish requires no stirring, delivering comforting, flavorful meals with minimal effort.

media:content.media:title: No Stir Needed—Just Relax!
media:content.media:description: Set it and forget it! This easy crockpot dish requires no stirring, delivering comforting, flavorful meals with minimal effort.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: One-Pot Mexican Mac & Cheese!
item.description: Creamy, cheesy mac with a Mexican twist—all made in one pot. Quick, flavorful, and perfect for a comforting weeknight meal.

media:content.media:title: One-Pot Mexican Mac & Cheese!
media:content.media:description: Creamy, cheesy mac with a Mexican twist—all made in one pot. Quick, flavorful, and perfect for a comforting weeknight meal.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Super Tasty And Crispy Firecracker Shrimp Recipe!
item.description: Make crispy shrimp tossed in a sweet and spicy firecracker sauce. This easy recipe delivers a balanced kick of flavor, perfect as an appetizer or main dish.

media:content.media:title: Super Tasty And Crispy Firecracker Shrimp Recipe!
media:content.media:description: Make crispy shrimp tossed in a sweet and spicy firecracker sauce. This easy recipe delivers a balanced kick of flavor, perfect as an appetizer or main dish.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page
